description: Ordered regex replacements for scholarly editorial pass. First match wins per rule pass; put specific phrases before generic \bKent wasn\b. Use flags: IGNORECASE, MULTILINE, DOTALL.

rules.comment: School / brand canonical spelling (house style); matches transcript STT 'Tesaract' and mixed 'Tesseract' lines

rules.pattern: referring to them as far and\r?\n\[00:10\] morear\.
rules.repl:
referring to them as farmor and
[00:10] morfar.
rules.comment: Ep2 cold open: STT split farfar/morfar across captions
Ep2 caption line: Bronzeface's first wife

rules.pattern: Kent wasn of the American Bank Note
rules.repl: Kent Frantzve of the American Bank Note

rules.comment: STT: Kenton Lorie France → Kent and Lori Frantzve (before Lorie France sweep)
Canonical: Lori Frantzve (not country France; Lorie is STT for Lori)
Ep5 ~01:31: Candace pun (Frantzve + Frankenstein); STT wrote France Baststein—do NOT replace with a real psychologist name
Ep4 ~11:43: Lori married-name chain; 'France' is STT for Frantzve, not the country
Ep4+: host-preferred spelling for Larry's surname (after France,Gwinta fix)

rules.pattern: wrote, "Thanks alumni Erika France for\r?\n\[01:51\] sharing the importance of being an\r?\n\[01:53\] everyday hero\. AOPA pride\."
rules.repl:
wrote, "Thanks alumni @ErikaFrantzve for
[01:51] sharing the everyday hero.
[01:53] #CocopahPRIDE."
rules.comment: Ep6 ~01:49: screenshot tweet uses @ErikaFrantzve + #CocopahPRIDE (STT: France/AOPA wrong)

rules.pattern: wrote, "Thanks alumni Erica France for\r?\n\[01:51\] sharing the importance of being an\r?\n\[01:53\] everyday hero\. AOPA pride\."
rules.repl:
wrote, "Thanks alumni @ErikaFrantzve for
[01:51] sharing the everyday hero.
[01:53] #CocopahPRIDE."
rules.comment: Ep6: raw STT spelling Erica + France; same Cocopah tweet correction

rules.pattern: people naming their schools looking\? I'm
rules.repl: people naming their schools looking...? I'm

rules.comment: Lori Frantzve (also fixes Lor's lawyer, etc.)
